channel.title: Audio on Hywel Stoakes
channel.description: Recent content in Audio on Hywel Stoakes

item.title: A Test of HTML5 Audio Capabilities in Hugo
item.description: A test of HTML5 audio in Hugo Here is an audio file (pulmonic consonant between two vowels). Your browser does not support the audio element Some text to break up the players Your browser does not support the audio element Some Javascript Play
